# Starlight Whispers of Eternal Hope
## Scripture
"And now, dear children, continue in him, so that when he appears we may be confident and unashamed before him at his coming." - 1 John 2:28

## Reflection
As we gaze up at the night sky, the twinkling stars whisper secrets of eternity. Their gentle sparkle reminds us of the eternal hope that lies within us. Just as the morning star shines brightly, guiding us through the darkness, Jesus, the light of the world, illuminates our path, giving us confidence and assurance. As we navigate life's journey, we can trust in His presence, knowing that He is always with us, guiding and directing us towards our eternal home.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, as we marvel at the starry night sky, we are reminded of Your eternal nature and the hope that lies within us. Help us to stay anchored in Your love and promises, trusting in Your sovereignty over all creation. May the starlight whispers of eternal hope guide us through life's challenges, and may we confidently look forward to the day when Jesus returns, shining brighter than any star. Fill us with Your light, that we may reflect Your glory and share the hope of eternity with a world in need. Amen.
